para1: SAIBA is more than a salon — it is a calm, beautiful space created with love, faith, patience, and purpose.
para2: Our vision is to bring luxury hair, beauty, and wellness services to every age, while building a warm community where everyone feels seen, cared for, and transformed.
para3: We can't wait to welcome you soon in Lexington, MA.
founder_quote: I created SAIBA as a place where everyone feels cared for — women, men, children, seniors, and families. Beauty is not only about looking good; it is about feeling peaceful, confident, and seen.
